name: Cinnamon Graham Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, cream together the brown sugar and shortening until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in honey and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Add the flour mixture to the butter mixture alternately with milk, beating well after each addition.
5. Chill the dough for several hours or overnight.
6. Divide the chilled dough into four equal parts.
7. On a well-floured surface, roll out each part to a rectangle measuring 15 inches by 5 inches.
8. Cut the rectangles crosswise into 6 small rectangles measuring 5 x 2-1/2 inches.
9. Place the crackers on an ungreased baking sheet.
10. Use the tines of a fork to mark a line across the center of each small rectangle.
11. Score additional patterns of holes on the squares using the fork tines.
12. In a small bowl, combine the granulated sugar and ground cinnamon.
13. Sprinkle the mixture evenly over the crackers.
14. Bake at 350°F for 13-15 minutes. Remove from the sheet immediately after baking.
